ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wrestlers" (
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wrestler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the wrestler */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the wrestler */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the wrestler in feet and inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the wrestler in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the wrestler */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the wrestler */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the wrestler made their professional debut */,
  "retirement_year" INTEGER /* Year the wrestler retired, if applicable */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary division the wrestler belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the wrestler's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A detailed biography of the wrestler */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The wrestler's Twitter handle for social media integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler being ranked */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the ranking belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking applies to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the wrestler */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches the wrestler participated in */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the wrestler achieved */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the wrestler suffered */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws the wrestler had */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the wrestler in the ranking system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the ranking was last updated */,
  "title_holds" INTEGER /* Number of title holds by the wrestler in the division */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the wrestler is currently active in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the division is currently active */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the division */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship associated with the division */,
  "championship_description" TEXT /* Description of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the match took place in */,
  "wrestler1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first wrestler in the match */,
  "wrestler2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second wrestler in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match took place */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., singles, tag team) */,
  "match_order" INTEGER /* The order of the match in the event */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "durations" REAL /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "decision" TEXT /* The decision of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type FOREIGN KEY ("match_type") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_wrestler1_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler1_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_wrestler2_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler2_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the venue */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The actual attendance at the event */,
  "ppv_views" INTEGER /* Number of pay-per-view buys */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., match time, number of pinfalls) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the statistic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wrestler_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., career wins, career losses) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the statistic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wrestler_statistics_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date from the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the injury on the wrestler's career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler who was suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension was given */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in days */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the suspension ends */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the suspension on the wrestler's career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)
